chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI CP No.D-2983 of 2023 CP No.D-2396 of 2023 ____________________________________________________________________ Date Order with Signature(s) of Judge(s) 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of CMA No.14263/2023 3. For hearing of main case 22.09.2025 Mr. Ali Asadullah Bullo, advocate for the petitioners Mr. Asad Abbasi, advocate for the private respondents Ms. Saima Imdad, AAG --------- Learned counsel for the petitioners, under instructions, does not press both the petitions as the same have become infructuous, which are accordingly dismissed as not pressed alongwith listed application(s). HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Nadir*
